# Seed Topic - Project Scaffolding

This is a sample seed topic for testing the topic scanner.

## Overview

Seed topics cover project scaffolding and initial setup patterns.

## Key Points

1. Use consistent project structure
2. Include proper documentation
3. Set up testing infrastructure early

## Examples

```bash
# Example scaffolding command
mkdir -p src/tests
```
